differences: Nanus adds commercial controls in the top bar, including theme and settings buttons.
The lower carousel from the Manus reference was replaced with functional workspace summary actions.
The mobile first screen shows one compact recommendation and one summary action to avoid fixed-nav overlap.
Copy is adapted from Manus help wording to Nanus execution wording.
Recommendations use Nanus document and skill workflows rather than source social-media examples.
suggestions: Keep the joined composer and recommendation surface as the baseline.
If an exact Manus clone is required later, remove Nanus-specific controls and restore the source copy.
Wire the current prompt-derived run state to backend run ledger and skill registry APIs next.
verdict.reasoning: The implementation preserves the Manus-style dark agent workspace, sidebar density, centered composer, recommendation tray, and quick action rhythm while adding functional commercial controls requested by the user. Remaining visual differences are intentional Nanus product adaptations rather than layout defects.

next_actions: Connect Skill Hub and Run Inspector to persistent backend state.
